mapQuery: Ranowell Hotel Kochchikade Negombo Sri Lanka
invitation: Together with their families, Ashen Piumal and Malshika Piumali joyfully invite you to celebrate their wedding ceremony.
specialMessage: We warmly invite you to join us as we begin a beautiful new chapter together. The celebration is inspired by Sri Lankan culture, family blessings, elegant traditions, music, love and unforgettable memories.

schedule.title: Traditional Poruwa Ceremony
schedule.note: Blessings, rituals and the beginning of a beautiful journey.

schedule.title: Wedding Lunch
schedule.note: A warm celebration meal with family and friends.

schedule.title: Photography & Celebration
schedule.note: Capturing memories, laughter and joyful moments.

schedule.title: Going Away Ceremony
schedule.note: A heartfelt farewell and blessings for the couple.
